outcome.label: Architectural Mechanism Provides Robust Credit Assignment and LLM Integration

nodes.label: Mechanism_TypeError_Resolved
nodes.watch_signal: System logs show zero 'TypeError' exceptions during gradient update cycles.

nodes.label: Mechanism_Differentiability_Robustness
nodes.watch_signal: Average 'GradientConsistencyScore' remains below 'differentiability_tolerance' across diverse simulated inputs.

nodes.label: Mechanism_Precise_Axiom_Learning
nodes.watch_signal: Learned axiom coefficients converge within 0.15 absolute difference of 'true_axiom_relevance' across varied (non-sparse, realistic) data distributions.

nodes.label: Mechanism_Handles_Discontinuities
nodes.watch_signal: A mathematically defined mechanism allows step-functions without triggering 'AxiomDifferentiabilityVeto' and still extracts usable gradients.

nodes.label: Mechanism_LLM_Integration_Concrete
nodes.watch_signal: Python code demonstrates axiom weights directly modifying LLM's prompt templates or internal attention mechanisms.
